title: Fathom Mod
description: Fathom mod is an action adventure style mod heavily inspired by terraria's calamity mod, terraria itself and ultrakill, to an extent.
body:
# tldr: 
- 9 weapons 
- 3 weapon classes 
- 18 trinkets
- 1 boss
- 1 biome + 1 mob in it

# Long description
Inspired from Terraria, Fathom Mod adds 3 weapon classes: Melee, Ranged and Assassin with 9 new weapons to choose from. Another thing inspired by terraria was the addition of "trinkets" which are equippables that, for now, passively help the player which have their own ui.  *Note: some things in vanilla have been tweaked for balancing purposes*

## What to expect
**"Blood Moon Harvest" update expected to come out some time in june/july (delayed due to school and scopecreep)**

Expected content in Blood Moon Harvest:
- 5 weapons
- 5 trinkets
- 3 crafting materials
- World events
- New weapon class
- Blood river entities
- Balance changes
- Possible changes to old things
- Changes to the trinket gui
- Permanent buffs
- Test world
- More stuff

## Preview of one of the weapons
![Preview of one of the weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b370f31cc7e765fc76b468f2fafdb89de9b2145a.png)


## Preview of trinkets
